title: Pvpkit
description: A mod for minecraft which allows users to get a full pvp kit in their inventory using the /pvp command.
body:
What the mod does: 


This is a client-side mod that adds a custom command (/pvp) to instantly generate a "God Kit" in your inventory. It bypasses the need for manual enchanting or item searching by injecting a fully prepared NBT-loaded chest directly into your hotbar.

Requirements
Client-Side Only: You do not need the mod installed on the server.

Creative Mode: You must be in Creative Mode for the server to accept the item packet.

Note: This works regardless of how you got Creative (OP, Builder rank, Creative server, housing permissions, or minigame phase).

The "God Kit" Contents
The command generates a single Chest containing 27 Shulker Boxes, efficiently packed with over 3,000 items:

Weapons (1.21.11 Specials)

Wind Burst Maces: 1x Pink Shulker (Wind Burst III, Density V, Breach IV).

Lunge Spears: 2x Lime Shulkers (Lunge III, Sharpness V).

"Perfection" Swords: 2x Purple Shulkers (Maxed Netherite with Sharpness V, Fire Aspect II, Looting III).

Maxed Axes: 2x Gray Shulkers (Efficiency V, Sharpness V).

"Glock" Bows: 2x Blue Shulkers containing bows with both Mending & Infinity.

Armor & Defense

God Gear: 4x Black Shulkers filled with Maxed Netherite Armor (Protection IV, Thorns III, Soul Speed III, Swift Sneak III).

Totems: 2x Yellow Shulkers (54 stacks of Totems of Undying).

Shields: 1x White Shulker (Unbreaking III, Mending).

Movement & Utility

Elytras: 2x Shulkers of Maxed Elytras.

Flight: 1x Orange Shulker of Firework Rockets.

Wind Charges: 1x White Shulker (27 stacks).

Resources: 2x Light Gray Shulkers of Maxed Pickaxes + 1x Cyan Shulker of XP Bottles.

Explosives & Trap Gear

Crystals: 1x Magenta Shulker (27 stacks of End Crystals).

Obsidian: 1x Brown Shulker (27 stacks of Obsidian).

Nukes: 1x Green Shulker (TNT Minecarts & Rails).

Technical Mechanism
The mod constructs the NBT data locally on your computer and sends a CreativeInventoryActionC2SPacket. This tells the server, "I have selected this item in the Creative Menu," causing the server to replicate the item exactly as defined in your code (enchantments and all) into your inventory.
